interfaces.name: getHomeFeaturedContent
interfaces.description: Get featured content for the homepage including featured books, latest blog posts, and the next upcoming event.

interfaces.name: getBlogFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available blog filters such as tags, years, and sort options for the blog listing page.

interfaces.name: searchBlogPosts
interfaces.description: Search and filter blog posts by keyword, tags, year, and sort order for the blog listing page.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: Free-text search term, e.g., 'worldbuilding'

tagCodes.description: Array of blog tag codes, e.g., ['fantasy', 'worldbuilding']

year.description: Filter posts by publication year, e.g., 2024

interfaces.name: getBlogPostDetail
interfaces.description: Get the full details of a single blog post for the blog post detail page.

parameters.name: postId
parameters.description: ID of the blog post to load

interfaces.name: saveBlogPostToSavedList
interfaces.description: Save a blog post to the user's saved posts / reading list for later reading.

parameters.name: postId
parameters.description: ID of the blog post to save

interfaces.name: getSavedBlogPosts
interfaces.description: Get all blog posts the user has saved to their reading list / saved posts view.

interfaces.name: submitBlogComment
interfaces.description: Submit a new comment on a specific blog post.

parameters.name: postId
parameters.description: ID of the blog post being commented on

parameters.name: content
parameters.description: Comment text body

interfaces.name: getBookFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for the books catalog such as series, formats, price range, and genres.

interfaces.name: listBooks
interfaces.description: List books for the catalog page with optional filters and sorting.

seriesCode.description: Series code to filter by, e.g., 'chronicles_of_aria', 'skyward_saga'

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort order, e.g., 'price_low_to_high', 'price_high_to_low', 'publication_date_newest_first', 'publication_date_oldest_first', 'popularity_desc'

interfaces.name: getBookDetail
interfaces.description: Get detailed information about a specific book for the book detail page.

parameters.name: bookId
parameters.description: ID of the book to load

interfaces.name: getReadingLists
interfaces.description: Get all reading lists created by the user for the reading lists page or list selection dialogs.

interfaces.name: createReadingList
interfaces.description: Create a new named reading list.

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Name of the reading list, e.g., 'spring_reading_plan'

interfaces.name: getReadingListDetail
interfaces.description: Get a specific reading list and its ordered items for display on the reading list detail view.

parameters.name: readingListId
parameters.description: ID of the reading list to load

interfaces.name: renameReadingList
interfaces.description: Rename an existing reading list.

interfaces.name: deleteReadingList
interfaces.description: Delete a reading list and all its items.

interfaces.name: addBookToReadingList
interfaces.description: Add a specific book to a chosen reading list.

parameters.name: bookId
parameters.description: ID of the book to add

interfaces.name: reorderReadingListItems
interfaces.description: Update the order of items in a reading list.

interfaces.name: removeReadingListItem
interfaces.description: Remove a single item from a reading list.

interfaces.name: getWishlist
interfaces.description: Get the user's wishlist with all books currently added.

interfaces.name: addBookToWishlist
interfaces.description: Add a book to the user's wishlist. Creates the wishlist if it does not exist.

parameters.name: bookId
parameters.description: ID of the book to add to the wishlist

interfaces.name: removeWishlistItem
interfaces.description: Remove an item from the wishlist.

interfaces.name: moveWishlistItemToReadingList
interfaces.description: Move a wishlist item to a reading list, removing it from the wishlist.

interfaces.name: addWishlistItemToCart
interfaces.description: Copy a wishlist item into the shopping cart, leaving it on the wishlist.

interfaces.name: getEventFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get options for event filters such as event types and month shortcuts.

interfaces.name: listEvents
interfaces.description: List upcoming events with optional filters for type, date range, and search text.

startDate.description: ISO start date for the filter range

endDate.description: ISO end date for the filter range

search.description: Free-text search in event titles and descriptions, e.g., 'live q&a'

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort order, e.g., 'start_date_asc', 'start_date_desc'

interfaces.name: getEventDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details of an event including its available sessions.

parameters.name: eventId
parameters.description: ID of the event to load

interfaces.name: registerForEventSession
interfaces.description: Register the user for a specific event session, capturing their name and email.

parameters.name: sessionId
parameters.description: ID of the event session to register for

interfaces.name: addEventToMyEvents
interfaces.description: Add an event (optionally with a specific session and registration) to the user's My Events list.

parameters.name: source
parameters.description: Source of the entry, e.g., 'registration' or 'manual_save'

interfaces.name: getMyEvents
interfaces.description: Get all events saved in the user's My Events list.

interfaces.name: removeMyEvent
interfaces.description: Remove an event from the user's My Events list.

interfaces.name: getQuoteFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter and sort options for the quotes listing page, including available books.

interfaces.name: listQuotes
interfaces.description: List quotes with optional filters for book and sorting by likes or recency.

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort order, e.g., 'most_liked', 'newest'

interfaces.name: getQuoteDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a single quote for the quote detail page.

parameters.name: quoteId
parameters.description: ID of the quote to load

interfaces.name: getQuoteShareLink
interfaces.description: Prepare the shareable link for a quote so the UI can copy it to the clipboard.

parameters.name: quoteId
parameters.description: ID of the quote to generate a share link for

interfaces.name: likeQuote
interfaces.description: Like or favorite a quote, incrementing its like count and toggling favorite status.

interfaces.name: getBundleFilterOptions
interfaces.description: Get filter options for bundles such as format, price ranges, and minimum books in bundle.

interfaces.name: listBundles
interfaces.description: List available bundles with optional filters and sorting for the bundles page.

minTotalBooks.description: Minimum number of books in the bundle

parameters.name: sortBy
parameters.description: Sort order, e.g., 'price_low_to_high', 'price_high_to_low'

interfaces.name: getBundleDetail
interfaces.description: Get full details for a bundle including included books for the bundle detail page.

parameters.name: bundleId
parameters.description: ID of the bundle to load

interfaces.name: addBundleToCart
interfaces.description: Add a bundle to the shopping cart, creating the cart if necessary.

parameters.name: bundleId
parameters.description: ID of the bundle to add

interfaces.name: addBookToCart
interfaces.description: Add a single book to the shopping cart, creating the cart if necessary.

parameters.name: bookId
parameters.description: ID of the book to add

interfaces.name: getCart
interfaces.description: Get the current shopping cart with all items and the estimated total.

interfaces.name: updateCartItemQuantity
interfaces.description: Update the quantity of a specific cart item and return the updated cart.

interfaces.name: removeCartItem
interfaces.description: Remove an item from the cart and return the updated cart.

interfaces.name: clearCart
interfaces.description: Remove all items from the cart.

interfaces.name: getNewsletterOptions
interfaces.description: Get available update frequencies and genre options for the newsletter signup form, plus default settings.

interfaces.name: subscribeToNewsletter
interfaces.description: Subscribe the user to the author's newsletter with selected frequency and genres.

parameters.name: updateFrequency
parameters.description: e.g., 'monthly'

parameters.name: preferredGenres
parameters.description: Array of genre codes, e.g., ['fantasy', 'science_fiction']

interfaces.name: getAboutContent
interfaces.description: Get static content for the About page including author bio, site purpose, and basic contact/legal info.

interfaces.name: submitContactMessage
interfaces.description: Submit a message from the About/contact form so the author can be contacted.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateCart
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load the existing cart from storage or create a new one and persist it.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateWishlist
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to load or create the single-user wishlist record.

helperFunctions.name: _getOrCreateSavedPostsList
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to manage the saved blog posts collection for the user.

helperFunctions.name: _getNextCalendarMonthRange
helperFunctions.description: Internal helper to compute the start and end dates of the next calendar month for event filters.
